name: discord
description: Discord bot: mention it and it answers from Orca AI. Slash commands (/model, /new, /help), a per-channel model picker, live streaming replies, status reactions and proactive cron/tick pushes. Each Discord role maps to allowed Orca projects + a role prompt.

configSchema.label: Bot token
configSchema.hint: Discord Developer Portal → Bot → Token. Enable the Message Content intent.

configSchema.label: Guild ID
configSchema.hint: Optional: only respond in this server (empty = all servers the bot is in).

configSchema.label: Notification channel ID
configSchema.hint: Where proactive messages (cron/tick results, escalations) are posted. Empty = no proactive pushes.

configSchema.label: Live streaming replies
configSchema.hint: Edit the reply in place as it streams (tool calls + text). Off = one message at the end.

configSchema.label: Role policies
configSchema.hint: First matching role wins. Users with no mapped role are ignored.
